_description: USAF — Sources Sought notice for satellite ground terminal maintenance. NOT an RFP. Only deadline is a relative capability statement response (15 calendar days from posting). Tests handling of relative dates and non-solicitation documents.

deadlines.label: Capability statement response due date
deadlines.rawText: Responses are due no later than 15 calendar days from the date of this posting

warnings: This is a Sources Sought notice, not a solicitation

_field_sources.OTHER_capability_statement: Sources Sought text: 'Responses are due no later than 15 calendar days from the date of this posting.' Relative date — no posting date in document text, so ISO datetime cannot be computed.
_field_sources.hasSubmissionDeadline: false — this is a Sources Sought, not a solicitation. No proposal submission deadline exists.
_field_sources.warnings: No timezone anywhere in document. Document explicitly states it is NOT an RFP.
_notes: Document explicitly states: 'This is NOT a Request for Proposal (RFP)'
The relative deadline is the hardest test — model should use rawText + UNPARSED_DATE note, not invent a dateTimeIso
